generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. Remember when France pulled out of NATO's command structure? We can't keep carrying the burden alone. The real national security risk is being taken advantage of while our own communities struggle. #StrongerAtHomeFirst
